title: tsaba' #6635
definition:
1) that which goes forth, army, war, warfare, host
    1a) army, host
        1a1) host (of organised army)
        1a2) host (of angels)
        1a3) of sun, moon, and stars
        1a4) of whole creation
    1b) war, warfare, service, go out to war
    1c) service
